explanation: This command modifies an existing scheduled task to execute from a suspicious location (AppData\Local\Temp), which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria for suspicious paths.
This command uses an environment variable (%TEMP%) to reference a suspicious location, which is equivalent to AppData\Local\Temp and matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command modifies a scheduled task to execute from the Users\Public directory, which is flagged as a suspicious location by the Sigma rule.
This command modifies a scheduled task to execute from the ProgramData directory, which is flagged as a suspicious location by the Sigma rule.
This command modifies a scheduled task to execute from the Downloads directory, which is flagged as a suspicious location by the Sigma rule.
